scripts.build: vite build && zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && node -e "require('node:fs').copyFileSync('zig-out/lib/compiler.wasm','lib/compiler.wasm')"
scripts.postinstall: vite build && zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && node -e "require('node:fs').copyFileSync('zig-out/lib/compiler.wasm','lib/compiler.wasm')"
